introSection: Spinning Coaster is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at CJ Barrymore's Family Entertainment Center in Clinton Township, Michigan, USA. It opened on April 3, 2019.
fullText:
Spinning Coaster is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at CJ Barrymore's Family Entertainment Center in Clinton Township, Michigan, USA. It opened on April 3, 2019.



Each row sits back-to-back.
